productDisplayName: Puma Men D Force Mid SF White Casual Shoes
description: These D Force Mid SF shoes from puma are a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes, inspired by sleek ferrari styling, are great for regular wear since their attractive design looks super hot when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic leather uppers with suede overlays for durability and protectionStitch detailing for added style and reinforcementLace-ups for snug FitLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortMid ankle for comfortTextile lining for extra comfortcat logo embroidered on the tongueStitch detailing in the form of formstripes on the sidesFerrari badge embedded on the lateral side of the heelPlastic heel cup with woven patternMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioningEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber traction outsole with tyre tread pattern and heel bumperfor better protection to the heel and better grip
